title: eschscholzia californica var. maritima
intro: Eschscholzia californica var. maritima, also known as the California poppy coastal variety, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Eschscholzia californica var. maritima include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and alleviate pain. It can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, with herbal preparations often involving the use of its roots and flowers.
